results.title: Sabina Aliyeva: Strong audit system helps reduce corruption risks
results.description: A strong audit system plays a vital role in protecting the legal interests of the state, economic entities, and citizens, ensuring efficient use of public resources, reducing corruption risks, and strengthening economic security, according to Azerbaijan's Human Rights Commissioner Sabina Aliyeva, Report informs.

results.title: Asia's growth edge: How scale became strength
results.description: The most important question facing participants at the Summer Davos in Dalian is how promising ideas can be transformed into broad-based improvements in living standards.

results.title: Maharashtra government's proposal to abolish Hazur Sahib Act, huge anger in Sikh community
results.description: There is intense anger in the Sikh community over the Maharashtra government's proposal to repeal the Hazur Sahib Act 1956 and implement a new law. Sikh leaders have accused the government of taking unilateral decisions without consultation, calling it interference in religious autonomy and traditions. The community has warned that religious rights will not be compromised.
